title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:

 265 |             query=query,

 268 |             include_episodic=True,

 273 |     def retrieve(
 274 |         self,
 275 |         query: str,
 276 |         top_k: int = 5,
 277 |         include_working: bool = True,
 278 |         include_episodic: bool = True,
 279 |         include_long_term: bool = True,
 280 |     ) -> List[Tuple[SessionSummary, float, str]]:
 281 |         """返回带分数和来源层的多层检索结果。"""
 282 |         if not self.enabled:
 283 |             return []
 284 |         return self.retriever.retrieve(
 285 |             query=query,
 286 |             top_k=top_k,
 287 |             include_working=include_working,
 288 |             include_episodic=include_episodic,
 289 |             include_long_term=include_long_term,
 290 |         )
 291 | 
 292 |     def search_long_term(self, query: str, top_k: int = 5) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 293 |         """仅检索长期记忆。"""
 294 |         if not self.enabled:
 295 |             return []
 296 |         return self.long_term_memory.search(query=query, top_k=top_k)
 297 | 
 298 |     def retrieve_by_file_path(self, file_path: str, top_k: int = 5) -> List[Tuple[SessionSummary, float, str]]:
 299 |         """按文件路径检索相关摘要。"""
 300 |         if not self.enabled:
 301 |             return []
 302 |         return self.retriever.retrieve_by_file_path(file_path=file_path, top_k=top_k)
 303 | 
 304 |     def retrieve_by_error_type(self, error_type: str, top_k: int = 5) -> List[Tuple[SessionSummary, float, str]]:
 305 |         """按错误类型检索相关摘要。"""
 306 |         if not self.enabled:
 307 |             return []
 308 |         return self.retriever.retrieve_by_error_type(error_type=error_type, top_k=top_k)
 309 | 
 310 |     def get_recent_summaries(self, n: int = 5) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 311 |         """获取最近情景摘要。"""
 312 |         if not self.enabled:
 313 |             return []
 314 |         return self.episodic_memory.get_recent(n)
 315 | 
 316 |     def get_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 317 |         """获取三层记忆统计信息。"""
 318 |         if not self.enabled:
 319 |             return {
 320 |                 "enabled": False,
 321 |                 "working_memory": {"size": 0, "max_size": self.working_memory.max_size, "usage_rate": 0},
 322 |                 "episodic_memory": {"size": 0, "max_size": self.episodic_memory.max_size, "usage_rate": 0},
 323 |                 "long_term_memory": {
 324 |                     "count": 0,
 325 |                     "summary_count": 0,
 326 |                     "item_count": 0,
 327 |                     "storage_dir": str(self.long_term_memory.storage_dir),
 328 |                 },
 329 |             }
 330 | 
 331 |         working_max = max(self.working_memory.max_size, 1)
 332 |         episodic_max = max(self.episodic_memory.max_size, 1)
 333 |         return {
 334 |             "enabled": True,
 335 |             "working_memory": {
 336 |                 "size": len(self.working_memory),
 337 |                 "max_size": self.working_memory.max_size,
 338 |                 "usage_rate": len(self.working_memory) / working_max,
 339 |             },
 340 |             "episodic_memory": {
 341 |                 "size": len(self.episodic_memory),
 342 |                 "max_size": self.episodic_memory.max_size,
 343 |                 "usage_rate": len(self.episodic_memory) / episodic_max,
 344 |             },
 345 |             "long_term_memory": {
